report.summary: Cycle-close v12: 6 new learn pages built since last EOD (chain-abstraction, gpu-compute, yield-bearing-stablecoins, crypto-payroll, solana-etf, defi-insurance). 2 promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (408 total), 2 in queue. 3 pages UX-polished. 42 TS errors confined to 2 files. All 6 API routes structurally healthy with cache layers. Git locks now 26-28h stale — 604 uncommitted files blocking all deploys. FOMC decision drops tomorrow 2pm ET.

sections.title: QA Tester — Page & Build Audit
items: 6 pages modified since last EOD: chain-abstraction, decentralized-gpu-compute-networks-guide, yield-bearing-stablecoins, crypto-payroll-guide-2026, solana-etf-guide-2026, defi-insurance-guide-2026
408 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (verified via grep). 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE (solana-etf, crypto-payroll) awaiting next promote cycle.
103 phantom slugs remain — published in PUBLISHED_PAGES but no page.tsx on disk. Known legacy issue, non-blocking for live pages.
4/6 recent pages are proper server components with metadata exports. 2 client components (chain-abstraction, yield-bearing-stablecoins) lack server-side OG metadata — noted for future refactor.
0/6 recent pages have JSON-LD structured data inline (rely on generateArticleSchema/generateFAQSchema helpers at build time — verified present in build-v11 report for solana-etf and crypto-payroll).

42 TypeScript errors across 2 files: crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (JSX escaping) and structured-data.examples.ts (template literal syntax). Both pre-existing, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config).
Design-2 cycle completed UX fixes: font size bumps on 3 pages, BackToTop added to chain-abstraction, tab touch targets increased to 44px+ on 2 pages.

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Route Health
items: All 6 public API routes have in-memory cache layers configured: prices (60s), fear-greed (600s/10min), trending (300s/5min), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s/5min), defi-yields (300s/5min).
CoinGecko integration: 4 routes (prices, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance) — all structurally healthy with fallback data patterns.
DefiLlama integration: defi-yields route — healthy but lacks explicit fallback data (amber flag).
Fear & Greed: alternative.me API — healthy with 10-min cache and stale-while-revalidate headers.
0/6 public routes have rate limiters wired — unchanged from prior cycles. Risk: any route is open to abuse if hit externally.
No rate limit hits or fallback triggers detectable from code review (would need runtime logs for confirmation — deploy is stale).

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: Latest deployed commit: cb65a9d (Day 42 — 'publish: promote 5 pages to production'). Deploy is now 10+ days stale.
Git lock files blocking all commits: HEAD.lock (28h stale), index.lock (26h stale). 604 uncommitted files.
Vercel trial status: unknown/critical. If expired, all pages go dark during FOMC — highest organic search moment of the week.
next.config.ts has ignoreBuildErrors: true — build will succeed on Vercel despite 42 TS errors.
CRITICAL: Only Jefe can fix — rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push. 2-minute fix.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Summary
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: build-v11 (Solana ETF + Crypto Payroll guides), publish-v9 (GPU Compute + DeFi Insurance promoted), design-2 (UX fixes on 3 pages), community-v13 (social content), standup-v15.
PUBLISHED PAGES: 408 total (+10 since standup-v9 reported 398). 2 in queue awaiting promotion.
CARRY-OVER: 103 phantom published slugs. 42 TS errors in 2 files. 0/6 API rate limiters. ~155 pages missing OG metadata. 2 client-component pages need server wrapper refactor for OG tags.
BLOCKER P0 (10th+ consecutive report): Git locks + Vercel billing. Nothing can deploy. FOMC Day 1 happening NOW, decision TOMORROW 2pm ET.

NEXT CYCLE PRIORITIES: (1) Jefe removes git locks + pushes, (2) promote solana-etf + crypto-payroll from queue, (3) build 2 more guides to refill pipeline, (4) wire rate limiters on public API routes.
